lore.thecopperierage.copper_horn: An item that will play a sound of the listed instrument when used.
lore.thecopperierage.crate: A storage block that can hold only one type of an item, but is movable by pistons.
tag.thecopperierage.copper_fans.descript: A block that blows mobs and items when powered.
tag.thecopperierage.gearboxes.descriptio: When powered from the side, this block transfers rotational energy to adjacent gearboxes and spins entities ontop.
tag.thecopperierage.sticky_gearboxes.des: A gearbox that spins blocks ontop when powered from the side.
tag.thecopperierage.chimes.description: A block that will emit a cute sound when interacted with.
tag.thecopperierage.copper_buttons.descr: A button that stays pressed for a duration equal to its oxidization level. Copper Golems can press it if they're bored or have just finished their depositing tasks.
tag.thecopperierage.copper_pressure_plat: A pressure plate that outputs a redstone signal dependending on how many occupied inventory slots entities ontop have. Oxidization lowers its sensitivity.
